Aquaman (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $335,061,807Details
International Box Office $813,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $1,148,861,807
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $29,121,859
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $43,403,249
Total $72,525,108
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Origin story of half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry and takes him on the journey of his lifetime—one that will not only force him to face who he really is, but to discover if he is worthy of who he was born to be…a king.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$67,873,522 (20.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.94 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:29.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$160,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,125 opening theaters/4,184 max. theaters, 7.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $438,908,941

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 21st, 2018 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
December 21st, 2018 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: December 6th, 2018 (Wide) (China)
December 12th, 2018 (Wide) (Taiwan)
December 12th, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
December 12th, 2018 (Wide) (Philippines)
December 12th, 2018 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: March 5th, 2019 by Warner Home Video
April 8th, 2019 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi violence and action, and for some language.
(Rating bulletin 2543 (Cert #51796), 9/5/2018)
Running Time: 143 minutes
Franchise: DC Extended Universe, Aquaman
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: Atlantis
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Sibling Rivalry, Treasure Hunters, Underwater
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., DC Films, RatPac Entertainment, The Safran Company, Cruel and Unusual Films, Mad Ghost Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The Origin story of half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry and takes him on the journey of his lifetime—one that will not only force him to face who he really is, but to discover if he is worthy of who he was born to be…a king.
